metadata.title: Quantitative Data Collection — Tier 3
data_quality_notes: PAX reports in USD. FEAUM 2020 estimated from IPO prospectus (Sep-2020 figure used as proxy for FY2020).

VINP reports in BRL. Converted to USD using annual average FX rates. Pre-merger (Vinci Partners) data used for FY2020-FY2023. BRL327bn AUM includes advisory assets; FEAUM sub-total not separately disclosed for FY2024.
PX reports in USD. FRE definition includes fee-related revenues minus fee-related expenses. IPO in Oct 2021; FY2020 data limited.

RF (Eurazeo) reports in EUR. Converted to USD using annual average FX rates. FRE definition: net recurring income from asset management. Balance sheet AUM included in total but excluded from third-party fee-paying AUM.
ANTIN reports in EUR. Converted to USD using annual average FX rates. Infrastructure-only specialist — 100% infrastructure AUM. IPO Sep 2021; FY2020 data from 2021 annual report comparatives.

data_points.notes: FY2020 from IPO prospectus (Sep 30 2020 figure). FY2021 includes Moneda acquisition (132% YoY incl. M&A, 20% organic). FY2024 = $33B per Q4 2024 earnings.
FY2020 from IPO prospectus (Dec 2019 figure ~$14.7B, used as proxy). FY2023 and FY2024 from earnings calls. FY2021-2022 not separately confirmed.
FY2023: $187.8M total DE, $1.26/sh. FY2024: $189M total DE, $1.24/sh (some sources report $1.27/sh for a slightly different calculation). Pre-2023 DE/share not confirmed at per-share level.
GAAP diluted EPS. FY2024 decline reflects non-cash items and acquisition integration costs.
FRE/management fee revenue. FY2021: 59% ($86M FRE). FY2023: 60% ($147.7M FRE). FY2024: 57% ($170.1M FRE / $292.4M mgmt fees).
Market cap $2.54B (Dec 2024) / FRE $170.1M = 14.9x.
Market cap $2.54B (Dec 2024) / DE $189M = 13.4x.
Estimated EV ~$2.54B (market cap, debt/cash details not separately confirmed) / FEAUM $33B = 7.7%. Approximate.
FY2021 includes Moneda acquisition. Organic FY2021 growth was ~20%.
Permanent capital comprises about 20% of FEAUM per management guidance. Over 60% of FEAUM is NAV-based (up from <10% at IPO).

VINP does not separately disclose FEAUM. Total AUM & advisory = BRL327B ($60.9B at avg FX) at FY2024 year-end includes advisory assets. Compass sub brought ~$41B AUM. Fee-earning sub-total not breakable from available data.

FY2020: BRL49.7B (~$9.6B). FY2021: BRL57.2B (~$10.6B). FY2022: BRL63B (~$12.2B). FY2024: BRL327B (~$60.9B at 2024 avg FX) — includes advisory; massive jump due to Compass merger + MAV + Lacan acquisitions in 2024.
FY2022: Adjusted DE BRL4.47/sh * 0.193 = ~$0.86/sh. FY2024: BRL4.26/sh * 0.1863 = ~$0.79/sh. Pre-2022 and FY2023 not confirmed at per-share USD level.
FY2023: ~50% margin. FY2024: 52% ex-VRS (management-reported). BRL248.4M FRE in FY2024.
Market cap ~$634M (Dec 2024, share price ~$9.78) / FRE BRL248.4M (~$46.3M at avg FX) = ~13.7x.
Market cap ~$634M / DE BRL239.1M (~$44.5M) = ~14.2x.
PX reports 'Fee-Paying AUM' which is equivalent to FEAUM. IPO Oct 2021. FY2020 not available as public company.
GAAP diluted EPS. FY2023 loss driven by non-cash charges. FY2024 recovery.
FRE $42.7M / Revenue $296.4M = 14.4%. PX uses a broader revenue base including catch-up and transaction fees, resulting in lower apparent FRE margin. Adjusted EBITDA margin is 48.7%.
Steady ~10% organic growth post-acquisition integration.
FRE $42.7M in FY2024, up 39% YoY. Prior-year FRE ~$30.7M.
Market cap $1.54B (Dec 2024) / FRE $42.7M = 36.1x.
Fee-Paying AUM. FY2022: EUR24.3B * 1.0535. FY2023: EUR25.8B * 1.0821. FY2024: EUR27.0B * 1.035 (eoy rate) = $27.9B. Third-party FPAUM growing faster than balance sheet component.
Total AUM incl. balance sheet. FY2021: EUR31B * 1.1828. FY2022: EUR34.1B * 1.0535. FY2023: EUR35B * 1.0821. FY2024: EUR36.1B * 1.035.
FRE/management fees. Consistent upward trajectory. FY2024 reached mid-term target range (35-40%) in first year of 4-year plan.
FY2020: EUR70M (+18%). FY2021: EUR93M (+30%). FY2022: EUR120M (+26%). FY2023: EUR138M (+22% reported). FY2024: EUR150M (+11% reported, reached in one year the CMD target).
Market cap EUR3.47B ($3.59B at eoy rate) / FRE EUR150M ($155.2M at avg rate) = ~23.1x.

EV ~$7.07B / FEAUM $27.9B = 25.3%. Note: Eurazeo's EV includes significant balance sheet portfolio (~EUR7.9B NAV), inflating EV/FEAUM relative to pure-play managers. This metric is less comparable for Eurazeo.
FY2023: +12% (pro forma Rhone). FY2024: +8% total, +12% third-party.
424 employees (excl. IMGP) / FEAUM $27.9B = 15.2 per $B.
EUR421M mgmt fees / avg FPAUM ~EUR26B = ~162 bps. Note: Eurazeo's mgmt fee base includes balance sheet assets, inflating the rate calculation relative to pure third-party managers.
Fee-Paying AUM. FY2023: ~EUR20.1B * 1.0821 = $21.7B (estimated from FY2024 +7.3% growth). FY2024: EUR21.6B * 1.035 = $22.4B.
Uses underlying EBITDA margin as proxy for FRE margin (>95% revenue from management fees). FY2020: 73% (included catch-up fees). FY2021: 60%. FY2023: 62%. FY2024: 59%.
Underlying EBITDA: FY2020 EUR132M. FY2021 EUR108.4M (-17.9%, catch-up effect). FY2022 EUR118.5M (+9.3%). FY2023 EUR175.4M (~+48%). FY2024 EUR186.9M (+6.5%).
Underlying EPS after dilution: FY2023 EUR0.73 * 1.0821 = $0.79. FY2024 EUR0.76 * 1.035 = $0.79.
Market cap EUR1.86B ($1.93B) / Underlying EBITDA EUR186.9M ($193.4M) = 10.3x. Uses EBITDA as FRE proxy.
Estimated EV ~$1.93B (market cap, minimal net debt) / FEAUM $22.4B = 8.6%.
Fee-Paying AUM +7.3% in FY2024.
~240 professionals / FEAUM $22.4B = 10.7 per $B. Infrastructure-only model is more headcount-efficient.
Revenue EUR318.4M (>95% mgmt fees) / avg FPAUM ~EUR20.9B = ~152 bps in EUR terms. USD-adjusted ~149 bps.
PAX operates across PE, infrastructure, credit, real estate, public equities, and global private markets solutions. Detailed % breakdown not available from public sources to compute HHI.
100% infrastructure — single asset class = HHI of 10,000. Recently launched Mid Cap and NextGen strategies but all within infrastructure.
Private Debt is a major growth area (EUR2.5B raised in 2024, +86% YoY). Exact AUM % not separately confirmed.
YoY FRE growth not calculable due to Compass merger making FY2023→FY2024 non-comparable (transformational M&A year).
PX reports 'Adjusted Net Income per diluted share' as closest DE proxy. FY2023: $0.82/sh. FY2024: $1.00/sh (+22% YoY). Does not report traditional DE.
Market cap $1.54B / ANI $120.2M = 12.8x. Uses Adjusted Net Income as DE proxy.
